name: Taro
magic_action_free: Looking delighted, it stands up against my chest and  affectionately licks my chin.
color_free: Its face has a mix of black and brown markings, similar to those of a Papillon. The body and the area around its nose is white.
pattern_free: Its face has a mix of black and brown markings, similar to those of a Papillon. The body and the area around its nose is white.
